name: Info Plum
recipeInstructions:
1. To peel plums, first drop them in boiling water for 30 seconds. The skin will then peel away easily.
2. One pound of plums (four to five larger Japanese varieties or 12 to 15 smaller European varieties) yields from 1½ - 2 cups chopped fruit.
Kitchen Tips:
- Bake plums in a pie
- Trade plums for apples in a crisp
- Buy a flat of plums and make jam or jelly
- Use plums in your homemade chutney
- Make plum sauce to serve with pork and duck
- Make a sweet-hot salsa with plums, bell peppers, onions, jalapeno chiles, and cilantro
- Cook plums with sugar, spices (cinnamon or ginger), and a little cornstarch for a delicious ice cream topping
- Cut plums and kiwi fruit into chunks. Toss them with a small amount of lime juice concentrate and grated lime peel for a refreshing fruit salad.
